behavior_summary: This NPC (Emrichol) delegates most behavior to shared sorcerer routines rather than containing bespoke logic.
U8P_EMRICHOL::look handles player 'examine' / U8P_EMRICHOL::look events by calling a shared sorcerer inspect routine and then suspending.
U8P_EMRICHOL::use delegates interaction handling to a shared sorcerer utility routine and then suspends.

U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea and U8P_EMRICHOL::leaveFastArea are proximity triggers that call sorcerer detection/reset routines to start or stop NPC activity when an actor enters or leaves the fast trigger region.
U8P_EMRICHOL::cast forwards a numeric parameter to the combat spell engine (SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop) to execute spell effects.
notable_control_flow: Each public process in this script (U8P_EMRICHOL::look, U8P_EMRICHOL::use, U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea, U8P_EMRICHOL::leaveFastArea, U8P_EMRICHOL::cast) immediately forwards to a shared external routine and then suspends — the script itself contains no branching, menus, or dialogue in the excerpt.
Proximity handling is separated into fast-area entry/exit: U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea -> SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer, U8P_EMRICHOL::leaveFastArea -> SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity.
Casting is performed by forwarding the provided uword parameter to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop; the script acts as a simple adapter for combat spell execution.
open_questions: What exact game-facing text or description (if any) SORCERER::func039C displays when U8P_EMRICHOL::look is invoked — the script delegates this so the visible output is in the shared routine (appears likely but not shown).
What specific behaviors SORCERER::func05EC implements for 'U8P_EMRICHOL::use' interactions (conversation, trading, or other interaction) — the script only delegates to it.

What the numeric parameter passed into U8P_EMRICHOL::cast maps to (a spell id or spell slot) and which concrete spells Emrichol can U8P_EMRICHOL::cast are not present in this excerpt (likely a spell id but low confidence).

main_function.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player examining or targeting Emrichol by delegating to a shared sorcerer inspect routine.
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine when the player issues a 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look' / examine action on this NPC.
Runs as the NPC's U8P_EMRICHOL::look handler (process type 0x0208).

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::look
function_map.role: Examine/U8P_EMRICHOL::look handler that delegates to SORCERER::func039C.

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::use
function_map.role: Use/interaction handler that delegates to SORCERER::func05EC.

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry trigger that calls SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer to begin proximity behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit trigger that calls SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity to stop/clear proximity behavior.

function_map.name: U8P_EMRICHOL::cast
function_map.role: Spell-casting adapter that forwards a uword parameter to SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop to execute the spell.

function_map.name: SORCERER::func039C
function_map.role: Shared sorcerer 'U8P_EMRICHOL::look'/inspect routine called by U8P_EMRICHOL::look.

function_map.name: SORCERER::func05EC
function_map.role: Shared sorcerer 'U8P_EMRICHOL::use' / interaction routine called by U8P_EMRICHOL::use.

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererDetectPlayer
function_map.role: Detection routine used to mark/detect player proximity and initiate NPC reaction.

function_map.name: SORCERER::sorcererResetActivity
function_map.role: Routine to reset detection state or ongoing activity when player leaves proximity.

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::combatSpellLoop
function_map.role: Combat spell execution loop receiving a spell identifier; called by U8P_EMRICHOL::cast.

external_calls.purpose: Perform the shared sorcerer inspect/U8P_EMRICHOL::look behavior for this NPC (presentation and any examine text/effects).
Handle the player 'U8P_EMRICHOL::use' interaction via a shared sorcerer routine (exact behavior unknown from excerpt).
Detect player entering proximity and begin NPC reaction/engagement.
Reset detection state or stop activity started on U8P_EMRICHOL::enterFastArea.
Execute the combat spell logic for the provided uword parameter (likely a spell id).
